div.class: tw-relative tw-bg-bg-surface tw-rounded-[24px] tw-p-4 md:tw-p-6 tw-shadow-sm tw-mb-10
tw-bg-bg-surface tw-rounded-[12px] tw-px-5 tw-py-2.5 tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-3 tw-w-max

a.class: tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-2 tw-text-text-muted hover:tw-text-heading tw-no-underline tw-transition-colors
tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-medium tw-text-[14px] tw-text-text-muted hover:tw-text-heading tw-no-underline

div.class: ut-thumb tw-w-20 tw-h-16 tw-rounded-[8px] tw-border-2 tw-border-[var(--ut-color-border-strong)] tw-overflow-hidden tw-cursor-pointer tw-bg-bg-surface
ut-thumb tw-w-20 tw-h-16 tw-rounded-[8px] tw-border-2 tw-border-transparent tw-overflow-hidden tw-cursor-pointer tw-bg-bg-surface
tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-gap-5 tw-p-2 lg:tw-p-4 tw-self-start tw-min-w-0

h1.class: ut-product-detail-title tw-text-[30px] tw-leading-[36px] tw-font-semibold tw-text-heading tw-m-0

t.t-value: 'Baru' if product.x_condition == 'new' else 'Bekas' if product.x_condition == 'used' else '-'

span.style: border: 1px solid var(--ut-color-heading); border-radius: 32px; height: 24px; font-size: 16px; color: var(--ut-color-heading-strong); line-height: 24px;
border: 1px solid var(--ut-color-border-strong); border-radius: 32px; height: 24px; font-size: 16px; color: var(--ut-color-text-body); line-height: 24px;
display:inline-flex; align-items:center; height:24px; padding:0 8px; border-radius:4px; background:#fff1f0; color:#f04438; font-size:13px; font-weight:700;

a.style: width:40px; height:40px; border:2px solid var(--ut-color-border-strong); border-radius:50%; background:transparent; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-decoration:none; flex-shrink:0; padding:0;

input.name: add_qty
input.style: width:64px !important; height:40px !important; border:2px solid var(--ut-color-border-strong) !important; border-radius:26px !important; background:transparent !important; text-align:center !important; padding:0 !important; margin:0 !important; font-size:16px !important; color:var(--ut-color-text-body) !important; outline:none !important; box-shadow:none !important; flex:none !important;

a.style: width:40px; height:40px; border:2px solid var(--ut-color-border-strong); border-radius:50%; background:transparent; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-decoration:none; flex-shrink:0; padding:0;

a.class: tw-flex-1 tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-gap-2 ut-btn-dark
a.style: background:var(--ut-color-button-bg); color:var(--ut-color-button-text); height:48px; border-radius:24px; border:none; font-size:16px; cursor:pointer; width:100%; text-decoration:none;

button.style: background:var(--ut-color-button-bg); color:var(--ut-color-button-text); height:48px; border-radius:24px; border:none; font-size:16px; cursor:pointer; width:100%;

a.title: Bagikan
a.style: width:48px; height:48px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--ut-color-button-bg); color:var(--ut-color-button-text); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0; text-decoration:none;

p.style: font-size:16px; color:var(--ut-color-text-body); margin:0; line-height:24px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;

a.style: width:163px; height:48px; border:2px solid var(--ut-color-heading); border-radius:24px; color:var(--ut-color-heading); font-size:16px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-decoration:none; background:transparent; box-sizing:border-box;

width:163px; height:48px; border:2px solid var(--ut-color-heading); border-radius:24px; color:var(--ut-color-heading); font-size:16px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-decoration:none; background:transparent; box-sizing:border-box;

width:217px; height:48px; border:1px solid var(--ut-color-border-strong); border-radius:24px; background:var(--ut-color-button-bg); color:var(--ut-color-button-text); font-size:16px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; text-decoration:none; box-sizing:border-box;

width:217px; height:48px; border:1px solid var(--ut-color-border-strong); border-radius:24px; background:var(--ut-color-button-bg); color:var(--ut-color-button-text); font-size:16px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; text-decoration:none; box-sizing:border-box;

div.style: width:100%; height:229px; background:var(--ut-color-bg-muted); border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden; position:relative;

iframe.style: width:100%; height:465px; position:absolute; top:-118px; left:0; border:none;

div.class: tw-hidden tw-absolute tw-z-[20] tw-bg-[var(--ut-color-bg-page)] tw-border tw-border-solid tw-border-heading tw-rounded-[31px] tw-w-[125px] tw-h-[62px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-gap-[10px] tw-shadow-lg

button.class: tw-w-[39px] tw-h-[39px] tw-rounded-full tw-bg-button tw-text-button-text tw-border-0 tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-cursor-pointer hover:tw-opacity-90 tw-transition-opacity

tw-w-[39px] tw-h-[39px] tw-rounded-full tw-bg-transparent tw-text-heading tw-border tw-border-solid tw-border-border tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-cursor-pointer hover:tw-bg-bg-surface tw-transition-colors

t.p: These premium wireless headphones deliver exceptional audio quality with advanced active noise cancellation technology. Perfect for music lovers, commuters, and professionals who demand the best in audio performance.
The ergonomic design ensures all-day comfort while the long-lasting battery keeps you connected for up to 30 hours of continuous playback.

div.class: tw-flex tw-gap-[30px] tw-overflow-x-auto tw-pt-5 tw-pb-6 tw-px-2

t.t-value: 'tw-bg-white tw-border tw-border-solid tw-border-gray-200 tw-rounded-[14px] tw-overflow-hidden tw-shadow-sm hover:tw-shadow-md hover:-tw-translate-y-1 tw-transition-all tw-duration-300 tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-h-full tw-no-underline tw-group'
